title: JobTokenSecretManager.java
description: This Java file implements a SecretManager for job tokens in Hadoop MapReduce. It extends the SecretManager class, overriding methods to handle job tokens. A TreeMap caches generated job tokens. Methods create, store, and retrieve job token secrets using a master key. The class interacts with Hadoop security classes for token management, handling JobTokenIdentifier, job IDs, and tokens as inputs, outputting job token secrets as SecretKey objects or byte arrays.

TITLE: JobTokenSecretManager.java

DESCRIPTION:
This Java file implements a SecretManager for job tokens in Hadoop MapReduce. It extends the SecretManager class, overriding methods to handle job tokens. A TreeMap caches generated job tokens. Methods create, store, and retrieve job token secrets using a master key. The class interacts with Hadoop security classes for token management, handling JobTokenIdentifier, job IDs, and tokens as inputs, outputting job token secrets as SecretKey objects or byte arrays.
